extra.native_parity_note: Headline row is the NATIVE Python SDID ATT (backend='native'). The native solver mirrors synthdid's collapsed-form Frank-Wolfe weights and zeta scaling, so the ATT is a T2 same-byte reference-parity row. Backend-native placebo SEs are reported as separately named diagnostic rows.
extra.se_reference: Python records StatsPAI deterministic all-control placebo SEs, R records synthdid_se placebo SEs, and Stata records sdid placebo SEs.
